/CAL:TO SSET APD MTR PRCS/ACM/WS/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OFRELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/DEF:TO ATTEND HOUSING ASSISTANCE, MENTAL HEALTH COUNSELING & GROUPS AS DIRECTED THRU ACM/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:PREHEARING CONF/DOP/
